title: Volume-Profile VWAP Entry Filter (Intraday Timing Enhancer)
summary: Compute intraday VWAP from yfinance 5-minute data and add a pre-execution check: for long entries, only allow if current price is within N% of VWAP (or below); for short entries, only if at or above VWAP. This builds on the already-spec'd Anchored VWAP Entry Gate (spec_complete) and extends it into the execution layer as a dynamic filter rather than just a signal. VWAP is used by 74% of hedge funds as an execution benchmark — buying below VWAP statistically represents better-than-average entry pricing.
expected_impact: Filters entries that occur when price is more than 0.5% above VWAP on a buy or below VWAP on a sell, reducing adverse selection on momentum-chasing fills; backtesting studies suggest this eliminates 10–20% of worst-timing entries while keeping most high-quality ones
